source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - C1 Compressor Piston Failure and Fire

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - South Marsh Island Block 128

actions_taken: Fire extinguished using firewater hose and 2 dry chemical fire extinguishers (30 lb. each)
Instrumentation and Electrical Contractor tested vibration switches
In-line desiccant dryer ordered for pneumatic supply inlets
event.summary: On January 16, 2024, at 0252 hours, the C1 compressor at Arena Offshore's SM-128B facility experienced a piston failure. The piston rod nut loosened due to component fault or wear, causing the two bottom connecting rod bolts to break. This allowed the piston rod nut to contact the head end of the cylinder and separate from the frame. As the housing broke, gas ignited. The vibration switch detected the abnormal vibration and tripped, but failed to initiate shutdown at the panel due to moisture in the output line that froze in the 17°F ambient temperature. The night operator discovered the fire, activated the fire alarm and ESD, alerted personnel, and the fire was extinguished without injuries.
recommendations: Install in-line desiccant dryer to pneumatic supply inlets of compressor control panel to prevent condensation formation
Improve compressor maintenance procedures to prevent piston scarring and component wear
Ensure vibration switch signal integrity in cold weather conditions

hazards.name: High-pressure compressed gas in C1 compressor
Mechanical wear and degradation of compressor components
Ignition sources from mechanical friction and hot surfaces

threats.name: Piston rod nut loosening due to wear or component fault
Piston rod nut contacting cylinder head and separating from frame
Vibration switch signal failure due to frozen moisture in pneumatic line

consequences.name: Uncontrolled gas release from compressor housing
Fire ignition from gas venting through vent system

controls.name: Compressor piston and rod maintenance inspection
controls.barrier_role: Detect early signs of component degradation
controls.lod_basis: Preventive maintenance to identify scarring and wear before failure

supporting_text: scarring was found on the piston. As per the compressor mechanic, the scarring that was discovered is generally a sign of poor maintenance

controls.name: Vibration switch monitoring system
controls.barrier_role: Detect abnormal compressor vibration and trigger automatic shutdown
controls.lod_basis: Automated detection of mechanical failure before catastrophic rupture

supporting_text: It was also determined that the C1 compressor vibration switch tripped but failed to initiate a shut down at the panel

The contractor found moisture in the output line of the vibration switch. Due to the freezing temperature at the time of the incident (17°F), it is suspected that the fluid froze which would have allowed the switch to trip but not allow the signal to the panel

controls.name: Pneumatic line desiccant dryer
controls.barrier_role: Prevent moisture condensation in vibration switch signal lines
controls.lod_basis: Protect vibration switch signal integrity in cold weather conditions

supporting_text: An in-line desiccant dryer to the pneumatic supply inlets of the compressor control panel were ordered and will to be installed
Desiccant dryers were ordered to prevent the condensation from forming in the tubing

controls.name: Fire alarm system activation
controls.lod_basis: Rapid personnel notification to enable emergency response

supporting_text: The NO activated the fire alarm and the emergency shut down system (ESD)
Shortly after the NO alerted personnel of the fire, the operators were able to extinguish the fire

controls.name: Emergency shutdown system (ESD)
controls.barrier_role: Automatically or manually shut down compressor operations during emergency
controls.lod_basis: Rapid isolation of hazardous equipment to prevent escalation

supporting_text: The NO activated the fire alarm and the emergency shut down system (ESD)
Shortly after the activation of the ESD, the NO went door-to-door alerting all personnel of the fire

controls.name: Fire suppression equipment (dry chemical extinguishers and firewater hose)
controls.lod_basis: Direct fire suppression to control and extinguish ignition

supporting_text: The operators were able to extinguish the fire using a firewater hose and 2 (30 lb.) dry chemical fire extinguishers
There were no injuries to personnel due to this incident

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
